releaseNotes:
• Fix: mini-player (and multi-view cells) no longer show a permanent black screen with a spinner. The overlay was forced into pure CPU decode, which stalls silently on MPEG-TS/H.264 streams even though the same channel plays fine in full-screen. The overlay now uses hardware decode in copy mode (mediacodec-copy on Android), which avoids decoder-pool contention while reliably rendering frames.
• The Hardware Decode toggle in Settings still applies to the mini-player — turning it off falls back to CPU decode as before.
